news.t: As 2026 Inflation Gets Stickier, Active Value ETF TVAL Spikes
TVAL: Finding the Overlooked Value in Large-Caps
Beat Volatility: The Power of Active ETFs

holdings.infoBox: TVAL is an equity ETF with a total of 165 individual holdings. The top holdings are Alphabet stock at 4.29%, Advanced Micro Devices at 2.32%, Amazon.com at 2.21%, Micron Technology at 2.10%, and Exxon Mobil at 1.92%.

overview.description: The T. Rowe Price Value ETF (TVAL) is an exchange-traded fund. The ETF currently has 755.88m in AUM and 164 holdings. TVAL is an actively managed fund of attractively valued US large-capitalization companies having the potential for stock price appreciation as perceived by the fund adviser TVAL was launched on Jun 14, 2023 and is issued by T. Rowe Price.

data.title: TVAL: Finding the Overlooked Value in Large-Caps
data.text: The T. Rowe Price Value ETF (TVAL) represents a different kind of active value ETF, one that gives managers the room to find undervalued companies without being locked into index rules. Key Takeaways:...

data.title: Beat Volatility: The Power of Active ETFs
data.text: Active equity ETFs posted double-digit returns in April. Conflicting signals from the Federal Reserve and a fracture in global oil alliances created an environment where stock selection matters.
